data.headline: Home Remodeling in Connecticut
data.subheadline: We remodel kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and more for homeowners across Fairfield and New Haven Counties, Connecticut. We communicate clearly, show up when we say we will, and finish the job. That’s what sets us apart, and why most of our clients never need to look for a contractor again.
data.eyebrow: CT HOME REMODELING — FAIRFIELD & NEW HAVEN COUNTIES
data.supporting_line: On-site or remote consultation via Google Meet. Complimentary and without obligation.

BuiltWell CT remodeling crew on site
Before and after kitchen remodel in Connecticut

data.title: Why Homeowners Choose BuiltWell CT
data.content:
Remodeling has a reputation problem. Contractors who disappear, timelines that stretch from weeks into months, phone calls that go unanswered. Most homeowners have a story. We built BuiltWell CT around three commitments that address those problems directly.

H3: We Communicate
You’ll know what’s happening on your project every day. Before we start, you receive a written proposal that spells out exactly what’s included, the timeline, and the cost.

Once construction begins, you get daily updates so you’re never left wondering. If something changes, we tell you immediately instead of waiting until you notice.

H3: We Show Up
We keep the schedule we commit to. Our crews arrive on time, work a full day, and clean the job site before they leave each evening. You shouldn’t have to live in a construction zone.

No tools scattered, no materials piled in your hallway, no dust on surfaces that should be protected. A clean site is part of the job, not an afterthought.

H3: We Finish What We Start
Projects end. Punch lists get completed. Walk-throughs happen on schedule. We don’t consider a job done until you’ve walked through it with us and told us it’s right.

If something isn’t what you expected, we fix it before we close out. That’s why our clients refer us to family and friends, and call us again for their next project.

data.title: Home Remodeling Services
data.content: We handle the full range of interior home remodeling, from individual rooms to whole-home renovations.

data.title: Our Services
data.subtitle: Whether you’re replacing a dated kitchen, finishing an unused basement, or adding square footage with a home addition, we bring the same standard of work and communication to every project.

items.title: Kitchen Remodeling
items.summary: The most-used room in your home deserves a careful plan. Cabinets, countertops, layout, plumbing, lighting, and flooring, all planned in detail before a single wall opens.
items.image_alt: BuiltWell CT kitchen remodeling consultation in a Connecticut home

items.title: Bathroom Remodeling
items.summary: From a single bathroom refresh to a complete primary suite overhaul. Tile, fixtures, vanities, shower systems, and all the finish work that holds up for decades.
items.image_alt: Luxury bathroom remodel by BuiltWell CT

items.title: Basement Finishing
items.summary: We turn unfinished basements into living space. Framed, insulated, drywalled, lit, and finished to match the rest of your home.

items.title: Flooring Installation
items.summary: Hardwood, engineered wood, luxury vinyl plank, and tile throughout your home.

items.title: Home Additions
items.summary: More space without leaving your neighborhood.

items.title: Interior Painting
items.summary: A clean, well-applied coat of paint changes how every room feels.

items.title: Interior Carpentry
items.summary: Crown molding, built-in shelving, wainscoting, coffered ceilings, and custom trim work.

items.title: Attic Conversions
items.summary: Convert overhead space into a bedroom, office, or bonus room.

items.title: Decks & Porches
items.summary: Outdoor living space built to last through Connecticut winters.

items.title: Insurance Reconstruction
items.summary: Rebuilding homes after fire, water, and storm damage.

items.title: Design & Planning
items.summary: Professional design coordination, material selection, and detailed project planning.

items.title: Comfort & Accessibility
items.summary: Aging-in-place modifications, ADA-compliant bathrooms, grab bars, walk-in showers.

data.title: Our Remodeling Process
data.subtitle: We follow the same five-step process on every project.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: We visit your home or connect via Google Meet at no charge.

steps.title: Planning
steps.description: You receive a written proposal with a clear breakdown.

steps.title: Selections
steps.description: We guide you through every material choice.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Construction begins on the agreed start date.

steps.title: Walkthrough
steps.description: We walk through the project together.
